commits.author: Dean Hall
lines: Fixed digit rollers could heavily overshoot at large warp speeds, causing them to oscillate. Now digit rollers will instead snap at significant simulation speeds to prevent this.

commits.author: Dean Hall
lines: Fixed aspect ratio not correctly locked during resizing for some gauge panels.
Added a very small alignment offset for roller digits, almost imperceptible. This aligns them visually with real world rollers, which have a very small alignment variation per digit.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Fixed terrain material textures not matching up with the tessellated surface.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Removed Size struct attribute layout for the PlanetUbo and MeshUbo as they are now automatically padded to the minUniformBufferOffsetAlignment.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Converted unused mean anomaly at epoch in the set orbit debug menu to time since periapsis which can be used in this case.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed thrust-to-weight calculation. Previously it was actually exhaust-velocity-to-mass.

commits.author: Dean Hall
lines: Added extra digit to rollers on Rendezvous Control panel.
Added XML parsing and stripping for easier and cleaner export of edited gauge canvases from within in the game.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Reverted the change to properly handle multiple trajectory events simultaneously because it caused two important regressions (failure to compute trajectories after escapes, failure to show closest approach to target).

commits.author: Dean Hall
lines: Added another significant digit for rendezvous control panel to bridge gap completely from KM to GM and beyond.
Changed threshold values for time rollers, to provide better readability as the values move through hours, minutes, and to seconds.

commits.author: Dean Hall
lines: Fixed gauge roller animations would have a weird backwards animation when rolling from 9 to 0. This had a variety of causes and required a complete rewrite of roller animation.
